docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY NUTTING SPENCER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FROGGE CARRON L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NUTTING SPENCER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FROGGE CARRON L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
